title: chrysanthemum alabasicum
intro: Chrysanthemum alabasicum, also known as the Korean or Chinese chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alabasicum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and respiratory issues, and supporting eye health. Chrysanthemum alabasicum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
